summary: Velion AI Assistant Phase 3 - Iteration 136. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All Phase 3 features verified. New features working: Tips endpoint with 6 categories (general, production, coming_soon, casting, infrastructure, pvp), Idle detection via idle_minutes param (triggers at >= 3 min), Quick ask chips (5 chips), 'Lo sapevi?' button showing tips in amber/italic style, Chat greeting 'Ogni domanda merita una risposta. Chiedimi.', Enhanced AI personality (mysterious, elegant, no emoji, Italian).
critical_code_review_comments: velion.py: VELION_TIPS dict has 6 categories with 3-8 tips each (general=8, production=4, coming_soon=4, casting=3, infrastructure=4, pvp=4)
velion.py: /tips endpoint mixes requested category with general tips for variety using random.sample()
velion.py: idle_minutes param on /player-status triggers idle message when >= 3
velion.py: TRIGGER_VARIANTS['idle'] has 4 message variants for idle detection
velion.py: VELION_SYSTEM_PROMPT enhanced with mysterious/elegant personality, no emoji rule, 2-3 sentence limit
VelionPanel.jsx: QUICK_ASKS array with 5 chips (Come guadagno?, Prossima mossa, Migliora film, PvP, Infrastrutture)
VelionPanel.jsx: ChatTab fetches tips on mount via /velion/tips?category=general&count=3
VelionPanel.jsx: handleSend accepts overrideText param for quick ask chips
VelionPanel.jsx: 'Lo sapevi?' button (data-testid='velion-tips-btn') adds tip message with role='tip' and amber styling
VelionOverlay.jsx: idleMinutesRef tracks idle time, updated every 30s, passed to player-status API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Velion Phase 3 fully verified. Key findings: 1) Tips endpoint GET /api/velion/tips?category=X&count=N returns tips array mixed with general tips. 2) Categories: general, production, coming_soon, casting, infrastructure, pvp. 3) Idle detection: idle_minutes >= 3 on player-status triggers idle message with priority='low'. 4) Quick ask chips have data-testid='velion-quick-0' through 'velion-quick-4'. 5) 'Lo sapevi?' button has data-testid='velion-tips-btn', shows tip in amber/italic style (bg-amber-500/10). 6) Chat greeting is 'Ogni domanda merita una risposta. Chiedimi.' 7) AI responses use enhanced personality: mysterious, elegant, no emoji, Italian, 2-3 sentences. 8) Daily bonus popup appears after login - close with 'Riscuoti' button. 9) VelionPanel opens via window.dispatchEvent(new Event('velion-tutorial-open')).

lo_sapevi_button.behavior: Shows random tip in amber/italic style in chat

chat_greeting.text: Ogni domanda merita una risposta. Chiedimi.

bubble_notification_regression.observed_message: Il Grande Mistero attende una tua decisione. Non lasciarlo in sospeso.
